plugin_desc: Perle IOLAN console-server SNMP baseline child template for Perle console and serial servers. The shared ConsoleServer SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public MIB facts confirm official Perle IOLAN MIB packages but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power device-health scalars, so this child template does not promote private objects into shared health metrics.
name: ConsoleServer
